events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the damper-position-vs-TAB-report mismatch is judged a **fail** (installed-defective/non-compliant) — the TAB report certifies each locked damper position to a design airflow, so any field disagreement means that terminal's airflow is unverified and likely outside the standard ~10% SMACNA/NEBB/AABC tolerance. Recommended actions: halt closeout on that branch, re-test and re-lock the damper to design CFM, and get the TAB agency/EOR to reissue the report page before proceeding.
